error_signature: unable to attach multiple files in Gmail node
title: Issue attaching multiple files in Gmail node
symptom: The user is unable to attach multiple files to an email using the Gmail node, resulting in failed email sending.
applies_when: Attempting to attach multiple binary files
not_this_if: Only one file is being attached
root_cause: The Gmail node requires a specific format for multiple attachments. Users often mistakenly try to use the binary data directly instead of providing a comma-separated list of binary field names.
fix_steps: In the Gmail node, locate the attachment parameter.
Use the expression {{ Object.keys($binary).join(',') }} to create a comma-separated list of binary field names.
Ensure that the binary files are correctly set up in the previous steps.
agent_instruction: Set the Gmail node attachment parameter to '{{ Object.keys($binary).join(',') }}'.
